title: Benebone Ring Indestructible Chew Toy for Aggressive Chewers, Long Lasting Tough Boredom Breaker for Dogs, Real Bacon Flavour, For Large Dogs, Made in the USA
features: CHEW AND CHALLENGE – Real bacon-flavoured virtually indestructible chew toy for strong dogs, with peanut butter pocket to make things extra-interesting. Curved for a paw-friendly grip, and great for a game of tug.
REAL BACON – We use only 100% REAL BACON for flavour. There is only 2 ingredients; Real bacon and Nylon, so no nasty added chemicals.

BOREDOM BREAKER – Making chew time extra challenging. Reducing boredom and making chews last longer, it props the stick at a nice angle for a good chew session. Perfect for large dogs up to 90 lb, like Labradors and Dalmations.

WEAR AND TEAR - While Benebone’s are long-lasting, we recommend discarding or recycling after a month, or sooner, to be on the safe side. If more than a sugar-cubes worth of product is missing, it’s time to go.

ABOUT BENEBONE - Developed in the USA, Benebone only use real flavours, and are focussed on developing long-lasting chews designed to keep your pup entertained for hours. Want to chat? Reach out to us directly and you’ll get a real person whose sole job is to make you and your pup happy.
description: Product Description How long does a Benebone last? In a few weeks, maybe a month, it’s usually time to retire. It varies from one dog to the next, so keep a close eye out for wear and tear. If you’re handy, try smoothing gnarly spots with a wood file or heavy grit sandpaper to prolong life. Are Benebones edible? Benebones have just the right amount of tantalising flavour to enhance your pup’s chewing experience. Our bones are made for a good chew session, but are not edible treats to be consumed. Watch for signs of wear and replace when necessary! Which size is best for my pup? We’ve got you covered with tiny bones for cute little 15-pounders, Giant bones for hundred-pounders and everything in between. If your pup is between sizes or an enthusiastic chewer, consider sizing up. Your pup will thank you! What are the ingredients? Benebones are made with USA-sourced nylon and flavoured with a variety of real ingredients like yummy bacon, chicken, peanut, beef tripe, maple wood and jack salmon. What’s different about a puppy Benebone? Our puppy Benebones are a tad softer for puppies without all their adult teeth just yet. Once your dog has adult teeth, it’s time to move on to our regular chews
